records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Endangered (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Endangering.]

defs: To put to hazard; to bring into danger or peril; to expose to loss or injury; as, to endanger life or peace.
quotes: All the other difficulties of his reign only exercised without endangering him.

defs: To incur the hazard of; to risk.
quotes: He that turneth the humors back . . . endangereth malign ulcers.
